episodes.title: Sarah Ferguson and Diddy Were 'Friends With Benefits'—Featuring Andrew Lownie
episodes.description:
New revelations from royal author Andrew Lownie's book, Entitled, about the fall of the former Prince Andrew and Duchess of York find that Sarah 'Fergie' Ferguson had a reported "friends with benefits" relationship with Sean 'Diddy' Combes. 

Andrew joins Newsweek's chief royal correspondent on today's episode of the Royal Report podcast to discuss some of the new revelations in the latest edition of his book including Diddy's alleged comments about Fergie and Andrew's children. 

The paperback edition is due out on May 21 containing even more material about the Yorks. 

This interview was so packed full of interesting revelations that we split in into two parts, with the second due out on May 16 which is focused on ex-Prince Andrew. 

From Buckingham Palace to Windsor Castle, and King Charles and Camilla to Prince William and Kate to Meghan and Harry, Newsweek's podcast The Royal Report brings you all the royal news. Hosted by Newsweek's chief royal correspondent Jack Royston, each episode features a mix of headlines and in-depth analysis. Subscribe and listen to the Royal Report from Newsweek or wherever you get your favorite shows.
